Data last synced with GitHub 7 days ago TypeScript 26.6k 3.2k 45 contributors last commit 22 days ago last user commit 22 days ago MIT License website created 4 months ago Social mentions Recent discussions about this repository across the web Qwen3 TTS model of my kid’s voice @twinturbomonkey · x.com · about 15 hours ago 🚨ElevenLabs just got real competition. Someone open-sourced a free app that replaces both ElevenLabs and WisprFlow. And it runs 100% locally. Voicebox can: → Clone a voice from just 3 seconds of… @VivekjyotiBhow1 · x.com · about 16 hours ago ElevenLabs acaba de perder su foso defensivo 🤯 ​Alguien ha lanzado como código abierto una sola aplicación que reemplaza a ElevenLabs Y A WisprFlow, y funciona 100% en local. ​→ Clona cualquier voz… @karlarboledas · x.com · about 18 hours ago Not many are playing around with AI + voice at the moment, but if you are interested in exploring try this opensource software. AI voice studio in your hands @S_BatMan · x.com · 1 day ago 夯到爆！！Github 又出狠活神器！斩获 2.5万 Stars，下载量突破70万次，目前最火的开源语音合成软件之一。 直接把：Whisper、语音克隆、TTS、Agent Voice整合到一起。 重点是：全本地运行。 @0X_XLog · x.com · 3 days ago 做播客或有声书时，要么用云服务担心隐私泄露，要么用本地工具功能太单一：语音合成归语音合成，听写归听写，后期处理还得另开软件。 GitHub： voicebox 是开源 AI 语音工作室，把语音输入、输出、编辑整合到一个工具里，完全本地运行。 主要功能：7 个 TTS 引擎支持 23 种语言、全局听写与语音输入、多轨时间线故事编辑器、代理语音输出（MCP 集成）、本地 LLM 精化、8… @Xx15573208 · x.com · 5 days ago Repository activities repository's daily and monthly activities across stars, forks, merged PRs, issues, and closed issues GitHub trending history Shows when the repository has appeared on GitHub Trending across any language all language ranking typescript ranking Featured Openhuman Your Personal AI super intelligence.
